cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently highlight competitive pay and comprehensive benefits as core advantages of working at the company.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members appreciate the company's commitment to maintaining a healthy work-life balance and providing a stable work environment.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the access to challenging projects, training programs, and clear pathways for career advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of reviews points to concerns regarding management ethics, favoritism, and a lack of accountability in certain areas.
